title: Variant Tools and Weaponry - More Weapons
description: This mod gives 10 extra weapons to craft and fight with.
body:
### Forge/Fabric/Neoforge
If you use minecraft forge 1.19 please use the latest forge version otherwise it can crash with thrown weapons.
This mod adds 10 new Weapons to craft from wood, stone, iron, gold and diamond. Weapons can be upgraded into netherite weapons.

#### Weapon list:
- Katana
- Dagger
- Longsword
- Greatsword
- Handaxe
- Battleaxe
- Greataxe
- Pike
- Glaive
- Halberd

 

#### Special item effects:

The Dagger and Handaxe can be thrown like the Trident and can also gain the Loyalty enchantment as well.

 

#### Custom Material recipes:

Wooden Rod - Can be crafted in the crafting station by putting 3 stick vertically and is used for the Greataxe and Polearm weapons.

![woddenrod](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/471/976/crafting-wooden-rod.png)
